evals.prompt: Run a batch QA pass for the next incomplete public document sets in `data/`. Use batch size 12, update the master report, and stop safely if a required first-gate command is missing.
evals.expected_output: The agent resolves run config, checks required commands, processes up to twelve public document sets, updates report and status files, and reports blockers briefly in Japanese if configuration is incomplete.

evals.prompt: Inspect `data/` for naming anomalies before QA, build a safe filename normalization plan, and record the proposed renames without applying unsafe moves.
evals.expected_output: The agent scans filenames, identifies naming anomalies, validates collision and doc-id impact, and writes a normalization plan into the report path without unsafe renames.

evals.prompt: Resume a partially completed confidential QA batch using `tmp/qa_status.json`, update only the remaining incomplete document sets, and deploy through the configured confidential command instead of GitHub push.
evals.expected_output: The agent resumes from machine-readable state, avoids public push behavior, updates report and status consistently, and uses confidential deployment rules.

evals.prompt: Run `repo-qa` in a GitHub Copilot runtime for a heavy public batch. Use the child handoff skill, keep working when Gemini is unavailable, and leave only Gemini-gated steps pending.
evals.expected_output: The agent loads the Copilot child skill, packages a single heavy-batch handoff, preserves the repo-qa contracts, and continues non-Gemini work instead of halting the whole batch when Gemini is unavailable.
